name: samvaad-iq-workspace
description: SAMVAAD-IQ — the conversational workspace for the NETRA crime-intelligence platform

scripts.postinstall: npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix functions/api install
scripts.evaluate: npm --prefix functions/api run evaluate && npm run release:manifest
scripts.test: npm run api:test && npm run api:smoke && npm --prefix functions/api run evaluate:check
scripts.validate: npm run client:lint && npm run build && npm test && npm run browser:test
